## Meeting Purpose

[Review account health and announce a new team structure.](https://fathom.video/share/f-RVPMNcnixjW5PbyQSFeQFaeaMxiwfy?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Webflow Scope Creep:** Webflow expects free "code components" work, citing an unclear early contract. Jason will deliver a proof-of-concept (POC) but will track all director-level strategy work in Linear to ensure visibility and create a reusable playbook.](https://fathom.video/share/f-RVPMNcnixjW5PbyQSFeQFaeaMxiwfy?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
  - [**Okta Churn Risk:** Okta's POC, Rachel, is overwhelmed by a new ABX role, causing project drift. Kyle will hold a reset meeting and may prospect other Okta teams to secure the account.](https://fathom.video/share/f-RVPMNcnixjW5PbyQSFeQFaeaMxiwfy?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)
  - [**Interwell Performance Risk:** Interwell's dev team repeatedly breaks the site by failing to implement redirects, causing traffic drops. Jakub will hold a reset meeting to define 90-day goals and mitigate churn risk.](https://fathom.video/share/f-RVPMNcnixjW5PbyQSFeQFaeaMxiwfy?tab=summary&timestamp=1322.0)
  - [**New Team Structure:** A new structure rolls out Dec 1, separating strategy (Account Strategists) from production (Managing Editors). This enables larger account loads (8–9 per AS) and creates a pool of floating support.](https://fathom.video/share/f-RVPMNcnixjW5PbyQSFeQFaeaMxiwfy?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)

## Topics

### Webflow: Scope Creep & Unclear Contract

  - [**Problem:** Webflow expects a new "code components" workstream for free, citing an unclear early contract.](https://fathom.video/share/f-RVPMNcnixjW5PbyQSFeQFaeaMxiwfy?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
  - [**Context:** The original SOW is outdated (e.g., 5,000 pages/year), forcing an exploration phase to define current value.](https://fathom.video/share/f-RVPMNcnixjW5PbyQSFeQFaeaMxiwfy?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [**Action Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/f-RVPMNcnixjW5PbyQSFeQFaeaMxiwfy?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
      - [Jason will deliver a small POC (2–3 examples) to fulfill a prior commitment.](https://fathom.video/share/f-RVPMNcnixjW5PbyQSFeQFaeaMxiwfy?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
      - [**New Process:** All director-level strategy work (like this POC) will be tracked in Linear.](https://fathom.video/share/f-RVPMNcnixjW5PbyQSFeQFaeaMxiwfy?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)
          - [**Why:** To ensure visibility, enable accurate resource planning, and create a reusable playbook for future clients.](https://fathom.video/share/f-RVPMNcnixjW5PbyQSFeQFaeaMxiwfy?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)

### Okta: Project Drift & Churn Risk

  - [**Problem:** Okta's POC, Rachel, is overwhelmed by a new ABX role, causing project drift and inconsistent brief delivery.](https://fathom.video/share/f-RVPMNcnixjW5PbyQSFeQFaeaMxiwfy?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)
  - [**Impact:** The account is at risk of churn due to custom, unscalable work.](https://fathom.video/share/f-RVPMNcnixjW5PbyQSFeQFaeaMxiwfy?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)
  - [**Action Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/f-RVPMNcnixjW5PbyQSFeQFaeaMxiwfy?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
      - [Kyle will hold a 1-hour reset meeting with Rachel next week to define clear priorities and success metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/f-RVPMNcnixjW5PbyQSFeQFaeaMxiwfy?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)
      - [**Contingency:** If the reset fails, Kyle will prospect other Okta teams (e.g., the blog team) to secure the account. Tyler can assist.](https://fathom.video/share/f-RVPMNcnixjW5PbyQSFeQFaeaMxiwfy?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)

### Interwell: Performance Risk from Client Errors

  - [**Problem:** Interwell's dev team repeatedly breaks the site by failing to implement redirects after URL changes.](https://fathom.video/share/f-RVPMNcnixjW5PbyQSFeQFaeaMxiwfy?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)
  - [**Impact:** This causes traffic drops and undermines GrowthX's SEO work.](https://fathom.video/share/f-RVPMNcnixjW5PbyQSFeQFaeaMxiwfy?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
  - [**Context:** The relationship has improved since a difficult feedback session, but execution remains a challenge.](https://fathom.video/share/f-RVPMNcnixjW5PbyQSFeQFaeaMxiwfy?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
  - [**Action Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/f-RVPMNcnixjW5PbyQSFeQFaeaMxiwfy?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
      - [Jakub will hold a reset meeting to define 90-day goals and align on shared success metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/f-RVPMNcnixjW5PbyQSFeQFaeaMxiwfy?tab=summary&timestamp=1584.0)
      - [**Mitigation:** GrowthX now has Git access to implement redirects directly, reducing reliance on the client.](https://fathom.video/share/f-RVPMNcnixjW5PbyQSFeQFaeaMxiwfy?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)

### Surge: Scaling Content Production

  - [**Goal:** Justify the large MRR by scaling content production for the data annotation persona.](https://fathom.video/share/f-RVPMNcnixjW5PbyQSFeQFaeaMxiwfy?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)
  - [**Plan:** Increase output from 25 to 50 articles/week to meet the original ramp schedule.](https://fathom.video/share/f-RVPMNcnixjW5PbyQSFeQFaeaMxiwfy?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)
  - [**Editorial Process:** Surge has approved publishing non-DA-specific content without their review.](https://fathom.video/share/f-RVPMNcnixjW5PbyQSFeQFaeaMxiwfy?tab=summary&timestamp=1890.0)
      - [**Why:** This unblocks the pipeline and allows the team to focus on scaling production.](https://fathom.video/share/f-RVPMNcnixjW5PbyQSFeQFaeaMxiwfy?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [**Risk:** The forecast is aggressive, but the client understands the need for rapid iteration to find what works.](https://fathom.video/share/f-RVPMNcnixjW5PbyQSFeQFaeaMxiwfy?tab=summary&timestamp=1961.0)

### New Team Structure (Effective Dec 1)

  - [**Rationale:** To scale operations, create clear career paths, and build a pool of floating support.](https://fathom.video/share/f-RVPMNcnixjW5PbyQSFeQFaeaMxiwfy?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
  - [**Key Changes:**](https://fathom.video/share/f-RVPMNcnixjW5PbyQSFeQFaeaMxiwfy?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
      - [**Account Strategists (AS):** Focus on client relationships and high-level strategy (8–9 accounts).](https://fathom.video/share/f-RVPMNcnixjW5PbyQSFeQFaeaMxiwfy?tab=summary&timestamp=2121.0)
      - [**Managing Editors (ME):** Own end-to-end production (3 accounts).](https://fathom.video/share/f-RVPMNcnixjW5PbyQSFeQFaeaMxiwfy?tab=summary&timestamp=2143.0)
      - [**Content Managers (CM):** Own end-to-end production (2 accounts).](https://fathom.video/share/f-RVPMNcnixjW5PbyQSFeQFaeaMxiwfy?tab=summary&timestamp=2103.0)
      - [**Pooled Directors:** Provide strategic oversight.](https://fathom.video/share/f-RVPMNcnixjW5PbyQSFeQFaeaMxiwfy?tab=summary&timestamp=2070.0)
  - [**Rollout:** Announced at the Tuesday All Hands. Promotions will be communicated on Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/f-RVPMNcnixjW5PbyQSFeQFaeaMxiwfy?tab=summary&timestamp=2430.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jason:** File a Linear ticket for the Webflow code components POC.](https://fathom.video/share/f-RVPMNcnixjW5PbyQSFeQFaeaMxiwfy?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
  - [**Kyle:** Hold the 1-hour reset meeting with Rachel at Okta.](https://fathom.video/share/f-RVPMNcnixjW5PbyQSFeQFaeaMxiwfy?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)
  - [**Jakub:** Hold the reset meeting with Interwell to define 90-day goals.](https://fathom.video/share/f-RVPMNcnixjW5PbyQSFeQFaeaMxiwfy?tab=summary&timestamp=1584.0)
  - [**Liz:** Implement the new editorial process for Surge, publishing non-DA content without client review.](https://fathom.video/share/f-RVPMNcnixjW5PbyQSFeQFaeaMxiwfy?tab=summary&timestamp=1890.0)
  - [**Andi:** Share the Figma file with the new team structure; announce changes at the Tuesday All Hands.](https://fathom.video/share/f-RVPMNcnixjW5PbyQSFeQFaeaMxiwfy?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
